title: 404 — Page not found
description: 404 — Page not found.

title: Animated Avengers ID Card | Karl Horning
description: Pure CSS Avengers ID card with animated rings, inspired by Tony Stark. Adapted from Kunal Sarkar's 2018 tutorial.

title: CSS Animated Emoji Heartbeat
description: Pure CSS heartbeat animation with a double-pulse rhythm, built with transform and drop-shadow.

title: CSS Animated Gradient Background
description: Pure CSS animated gradient background with a shifting four-colour loop and a responsive hero heading.

title: CSS Animated Link Examples
description: Pure CSS animated link styles — highlights, underline expands, wipes, and colour changes, all driven by transitions.

title: CSS Button Gradient Animation
description: Pure CSS button with a rotating gradient border, animated on hover using @property for smooth conic interpolation.

title: CSS Reddit Loader
description: Pure CSS loader inspired by Reddit's pulsating dot animation.

title: CSS Responsive Form
description: A responsive contact form with pure CSS validation feedback — no JavaScript.

title: Pure CSS X-Men: Cyclops
description: A pure CSS image of Cyclops from the X-Men. This image was inspired by Jag Nagra's Cyclops.

title: freeCodeCamp: Build a Survey Form
description: A responsive survey form built for freeCodeCamp's Responsive Web Design certification, collecting user details, preferences and feedback with accessible HTML.

title: freeCodeCamp: Build a Technical Documentation Page
description: A freeCodeCamp technical documentation page covering JavaScript fundamentals: variables, scope, constants, data types, control flow, and functions.

title: freeCodeCamp: Build a Wikipedia Viewer
description: A Wikipedia viewer built for the freeCodeCamp challenge. Search for articles or open a random one, with jQuery UI autocomplete.

title: freeCodeCamp: Product Landing Page
description: Geezer is a responsive music streaming product landing page built for freeCodeCamp's Responsive Web Design certification. Discover playlists, stations, and tracks — your music everywhere.

title: freeCodeCamp: Random Quote Machine 2016
description: My original 2016 freeCodeCamp random quote machine — picks a random quote from a hardcoded list and changes the background colour with each new one.

title: freeCodeCamp: Random Quote Machine 2019
description: A 2019 update to my freeCodeCamp random quote machine — displays random quotes with gradient backgrounds, and lets you tweet your favourites. Press Space for a new quote or T to tweet.

title: freeCodeCamp: Tribute Page 2017
description: A tribute page to Homer Simpson — quotes, jobs, and a brief biography. Built for the 2017 freeCodeCamp curriculum.

title: freeCodeCamp: Tribute Page 2018
description: A Homer Simpson tribute page originally built for the freeCodeCamp 'Build a Tribute Page' challenge. Updated in 2018 to practice Bootstrap further.

title: Changing Background on Scroll
description: Dynamic background colour transition on scroll using JavaScript and CSS. The page's background updates to match the data-color attribute of each section as the user scrolls.

title: JavaScript Animated Download Button
description: A button with a ripple effect on click and a downward arrow animation on hover. The ripple is animated with CSS keyframes, and the effect disappears after the animation, while JavaScript handles the ripple creation and cleanup.

title: JavaScript Binary Clock
description: This project is a binary clock implemented using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It displays the current time in a binary format.

title: JavaScript Change String Case
description: A string formatting tool with multiple options. Users can input and convert a string into snake_case, kebab-case, camelCase, or PascalCase. The selected format is applied, and the formatted string is automatically copied to the clipboard.

title: JavaScript Dynamic Hero Search
description: Dark-themed superhero search and filter application using JavaScript. Features real-time search with dynamic table updates.

title: JavaScript Key Codes Keyboard Event Handler
description: Press any key to inspect its KeyboardEvent properties — key, code, and modifier states — displayed as a live terminal-style object.

title: JavaScript Particle Effect Button
description: An HTML5 canvas and JavaScript button with an explosion effect on click. Particles explode from the button's surface, using its colour data, and the animation is rendered using a custom particle class and canvas.

title: JavaScript Word Count Tracker
description: A distraction-free writing area that tracks your word count as you type.

title: Parallax Photo Gallery
description: A parallax photo gallery built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Scroll to see each full-viewport image move at a different speed.

title: Random Password Generator
description: A password generator that produces dash-separated alphanumeric passwords. Press the button or hit Space to generate, then copy to clipboard.

title: Portfolio 2016
description: This project showcases my skills and projects as a business English teacher and coder based in Portugal. The website features various sections including an about me page, portfolio, contact form, and social links.

title: Portfolio 2019
description: My portfolio site from 2019. CSS manages layout, typography, and transitions, while JavaScript controls scroll-triggered visibility and smooth scrolling. The site also includes a contact form with anti-bot measures.

title: Ghostbusters Logo
description: A hand-traced recreation of the Ghostbusters logo — drawn by me in Affinity Designer and animated using pure CSS and SVG only (no GSAP, no JavaScript).

title: GSAP SVG Computer Animation
description: Interactive computer animation using GSAP and an SVG. Features a button that triggers a sequence animating the computer's assembly, complete with scaling, bounce, and staggered effects. Button states include hover, active, and disabled.

title: SVG Canvas Snowfall Animation
description: Holiday-themed page with animated Christmas lights and snowfall effects. CSS handles the festive background colour change and layout, while JavaScript manages the snowfall animation and canvas resizing.

title: SVG CSS Animated UFO
description: A CSS animation of an SVG UFO. The UFO bobs up and down while stars twinkle using CSS keyframe animations.

title: SVG Rorschach Animation (CSS Gooey Blobs)
description: A responsive Rorschach-style SVG animation using a gooey filter and CSS keyframes. Accessible (reduced motion), lightweight, and built for CodePen.

title: SVG Vivus Line Drawing
description: An SVG animation of 'Hello World' created using the Vivus library, featuring a 'Restart Animation' button that allows users to replay the animation after it has completed.
